name: Missiiagan-Pakwejigan (Sunflower Bannock)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sunflower seeds, water, and salt in a pot.
2. Cover and bring to a simmer over low heat for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
3. When thoroughly cooked, crush the seeds into a paste using a fork or potato masher.
4. Gradually add corn flour, one tablespoon at a time, stirring until thickened.
5. Work with your hands; cool slightly if desired.
6. Shape small, flat pancakes measuring approximately 5 inches in diameter.
7. Heat oil in a pan and fry both sides of the pancakes, adding more oil as needed to prevent sticking.
8. Drain excess oil on paper towels before serving.
